polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly one paragraph, start with Bullish:, Bearish:, or Mixed: followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret overall market sentiment based on data. The data includes Fed rates: high probability of no change (75%) vs increase 25bps (24%). So expectation of stable rates (bullish for equities?). WTI hitting $90 high: 77% yes, $95 high: 42% yes. So expectation of oil price up to $90 likely. Israel-Iran ceasefire continues through July 25: 73% yes. US-Iran effective ceasefire by July 24: only 4% yes (so unlikely). US invade Iran before 2027: 29% yes (low). LeBron James to Warriors: 16% yes (low). Overall sentiment: moderate optimism about stable rates, higher oil, ceasefire between Israel and Iran, low chance of US invasion or US-Iran ceasefire. So overall maybe Mixed? But we need to pick one label.

Given stable rates (no change) and oil up, plus Israel-Iran ceasefire likely, suggests bullish for markets (lower geopolitical risk, stable monetary policy). However low chance of US-Iran ceasefire and some invasion risk (29%) could be bearish. But overall seems bullish.
